query: The design doc for the rate-limiter is already written — now go do the technical research: best practices, known gotchas for this approach, and drop it under Technical Research in the doc.
Run an OWASP Top 10 pass over this new file-upload feature and record which categories actually apply and how we'll mitigate each.
Before we build the caching layer, search the codebase for anything we can reuse and make sure we're not duplicating an existing helper.
Just do the research phase for this feature — web plus codebase investigation and at least three TDD scenarios — skip the brainstorm and the worktree setup.
Pull together the security and best-practices research for the OAuth integration and append it to the feature's design doc.
Let's plan this feature from scratch — brainstorm the design with me one question at a time, then create the branch, worktree, and task list.
I need a competitive landscape report comparing Datadog, Grafana Cloud, and New Relic on pricing and features for a 500-node cluster.
Give me a comprehensive market analysis of the vector-database space — top players, funding, and the 3-5 year outlook.
Start implementing task 1 with TDD — write the failing test first, then make it pass.
Run the security scan, lint, and full test suite before we open the PR.
